define.name: RSTM_SEEK_SET
define.brief: The file offset is set to offset bytes.

define.name: RSTM_SEEK_CUR
define.brief: The file offset is set to its current location plus offset bytes.

define.name: RSTM_SEEK_END
define.brief: The file offset is set to the size of the file plus offset bytes.

interface.name: random_stream
interface.details:
This module define an interface for generic random data streams.
This interface is meant to be implemented in classes requiring file-like capability.

method.name: rstmSeek
method.details: This function changes the function read/write offset.
method.return: Upon successful completion, lseek() returns the resulting offset location as measured in bytes from the beginning of the file.
